channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: GitHub Code Quality: Improvements to standard findings in public preview
item.description: We’ve updated the GitHub Code Quality experience to make it easier to navigate and triage findings across your repository. GitHub Code Quality standard findings help you detect potential reliability and… The post GitHub Code Quality: Improvements to standard findings in public preview appeared...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Windows 11 Insider Update GSOD (Green Screen), Can’t Install
item.description: Getting Green Screen of Death (GSOD) while updating to Canary Build 27858: KMODE_EXCEPTION_NOT_HANDLED. Crashes every time during download can’t install at all.
item.dc:creator: Stonehu

item.title: Windows 11 Dark Mode Incomplete, Old UI Still White
item.description: Full system dark mode is enabled, but old windows like File Properties, Control Panel, and progress popups stay bright white. Android/iOS have had full dark mode for years—why can’t Microsoft fix this?
item.dc:creator: JacobBrown

item.title: Windows 11 can’t eject USB drive, says it’s in use
item.description: Every time I try to eject my USB drive on Windows 11, it says the device is in use. I closed all windows but it still won’t work. I don’t want to pull it out directly. Any fix?
item.dc:creator: AnselRhodes

item.title: Windows 11 screen brightness won’t adjust, stuck at max
item.description: I try to adjust the screen brightness on my Windows 11 laptop, but the slider doesn’t work. It stays at the brightest and hurts my eyes. How to fix the brightness control?
item.dc:creator: DaxxonFoster

item.title: Windows 12 Nitro – More Than Just a System 😎😉
item.description: Ultra‑light. Ultra‑fast. Ultra‑modern.The new generation of Windows arrives in a form we’ve never seen before.No clutter. No unnecessary baggage. No outdated multimedia layers slowing down performance. What Windows 12 Nitro brings:Ultra‑light core – a clean system without redundant multimedia...
item.dc:creator: kikero_exe

item.title: Any good ai image to video generator that works well on Windows?
item.description: Hi everyone,I got several images that I'd like to convert into a video, and I'm looking for a solution that provides high-quality results without too much complexity. In fact, I came across some AI tools, but none seem to work quite as expected. Is there any good ai image to video generator that...
item.dc:creator: DeclanGray

item.title: How to fix iphone keeps restarting every a few minutes after update
item.description: Hi everyone,I'm new here and hoping someone can point me in the right direction. My iPhone has started restarting itself every few minutes, and it's happening continuously. I haven't changed any settings recently, but the phone basically becomes unusable because it shuts down and reboots before I...
item.dc:creator: AsherReed

item.title: From CI/CD to Continuous AI: The Future of GitHub Automation
item.description: Introduction For over a decade, CI/CD (Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment) has been the backbone of modern software engineering. It helped teams move from manual, error-prone deployments to automated, reliable pipelines. But today, we are standing at the edge of another...
item.dc:creator: Ravindra_Kumar_Vishwakarma

item.title: [YULA] Firefox Browser
item.description: Download the current version from Firefox Browser on its official website.1. The different versions of Firefox2. The user profile3. Extensions, themes and plugins and search engines for Firefox4. Frequently asked questions, tips and tricksFirefox Browser is in constant development, so there are...
item.dc:creator: HCouston

item.title: Windows live mail Password
item.description: Hello to all of you How to find WLM password??? I know it's an old email client!But I would like to get it back on track. Thank you for your help
item.dc:creator: Hassanui

item.title: Windows Insider: Can: 29565, Dev: 26300.8170, Bêta: 26220.8165
item.description: Welcome to the "Windows Insider" topic which talks about the latest developments in the system and news about the program set up by Microsoft. If you're not enrolled in the Insider program and aren't interested in beta testing, this is probably it the Windows 10 topic or Windows 11 that you are...
item.dc:creator: Azaellow

item.title: Microsoft Purview Referential Architecture Diagrams
item.description: The Microsoft Purview architecture diagrams provide a referential view of how data classification, sensitivity labeling, Data Loss Prevention (DLP) and Insider Risk operate across Microsoft 365 workloads. These diagrams are intended to help organisations understand where policy evaluation occurs,...
item.dc:creator: MaximeBombardier

item.title: Copilot data residency in US + EU and FedRAMP compliance now available
item.description: GitHub Copilot now supports data residency for US and EU regions, ensuring all inference processing and associated data stay within your designated geography. For US government customers, all model hosts… The post Copilot data residency in US + EU and FedRAMP compliance now available appeared first...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Govern AI Agents on App Service with the Microsoft Agent Governance Toolkit
item.description: Part 3 of 3 — Multi-Agent AI on Azure App Service In Blog 1, we built a multi-agent travel planner with Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 on App Service. In Blog 2, we added observability with OpenTelemetry and the new Application Insights Agents view. Now in Part 3, we secure those agents for...
item.dc:creator: jordanselig

item.title: Fix merge conflicts in three clicks with Copilot cloud agent
item.description: You can now fix merge conflicts in three clicks with the new Fix with Copilot button on github.com, powered by Copilot cloud agent. Click the button, and a comment is… The post Fix merge conflicts in three clicks with Copilot cloud agent appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Announcing Public Preview: Security Copilot’s Email Summary in Microsoft Defender
item.description: Co-Authors: Christina Da Gama Henriquez and Ajaj Shaikh AI is rapidly reshaping both sides of the security landscape, and email remains one of the most common and complex entry points for attacks. As adversaries use AI to scale more sophisticated phishing and email-based threats, defenders are...
item.dc:creator: cristinadagamah

item.title: GA: DCasv6 and ECasv6 confidential VMs based on 4th Generation AMD EPYC™ processors
item.description: Today, Azure has expanded its confidential computing offerings with the general availability of the DCasv6 and ECasv6 confidential VMs. Regional availability April 13 2026: West Europe Jan 30 2026: Canada Central, Canada East, Norway East, Norway West, Italy North, Germany North, France South,...
item.dc:creator: Rakeshginjupalli

item.title: GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with GitHub Pages
item.description: Learn how to create a free website for any repository on GitHub Pages. The post GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with GitHub Pages appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Kedasha Kerr

item.title: When will Windows 11 natively support Auracast broadcasting?
item.description: My Galaxy S25/S26 Ultra supports Auracast, letting me stream Netflix to two Galaxy Buds4 Pro at once. Why isn’t native Auracast broadcast available on Windows 11? Insider builds have a limited Share Audio feature for select devices, but I want full native Auracast support for all Windows 11...
item.dc:creator: AsherBowie

item.title: Remote control CLI sessions on web and mobile in public preview
item.description: The Copilot CLI is no longer a purely local experience. Today we’re launching copilot --remote: With remote capabilities, you can now monitor and steer a running CLI session directly from… The post Remote control CLI sessions on web and mobile in public preview appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Windows 11 File Explorer & Folders Extremely Laggy
item.description: Opening File Explorer and folders on Windows 11 is very laggy and slow to load, especially with many files. How can I optimize this?
item.dc:creator: HoltSawye

item.title: Windows 11 Automatic Updates Won’t Turn Off, Keeps Rebooting
item.description: I can’t disable automatic updates on Windows 11. I paused updates in settings, but the system still downloads them and forces restarts. How to turn them off completely?
item.dc:creator: BreckenFoster

item.title: Windows 11 Right-Click Menu Extremely Slow to Load
item.description: Right-clicking on the Windows 11 desktop is very slow; it takes a long time to show the menu. Clearing cache didn’t help. Does anyone know a fix?
item.dc:creator: Debiora

item.title: User with intermittent poor performance in Teams
item.description: We have a Dell laptop user who has intermittent poor performance with Teams. Video and audio get laggy. Replaced all of his hardware with newer equipment, made sure drivers were all up to date, yet the problem continues. Clearing the Teams cache works most of the time. This doesn't happen with most...
item.dc:creator: NoSpamSam

item.title: Connecting an ExpressRoute circuit to Megaport Virtual Edge
item.description: Megaport is an ExpressRoute partner in many locations. The Megaport Cloud Router (MCR) allows ExpressRoute customers to connect leased lines to their on-premise locations, and to connect other Cloud Providers. MCR is easy to set up and operate, it even automatically configures the ExpressRoute...
item.dc:creator: Marc de Droog

item.title: Writing PowerShell for the Eventually Consistent Entra ID Database
item.description: Entra ID uses an eventually consistent multi-region database architecture. PowerShell code that fetches and updates Entra ID objects needs to interact with the database in the most efficient manner. This article illustrates some guidance from Microsoft engineering with examples from the Microsoft...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: ALTER TABLE inside explicit transactions in Fabric Data Warehouse (Generally Available)
item.description: Schema evolution is a fact of life for modern analytics platforms. As data models grow, teams need to add columns, drop unused fields, and evolve constraints—often as part of tightly controlled deployment pipelines. Fabric DW supported transactional execution for key table‑focused DDLs like CREATE...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Bring your local files to OneLake with OneLake file explorer (Generally Available)
item.description: Adopted by thousands of active users, OneLake File Explorer enables developers, data scientists, and business users to move data from local files into OneLake quickly—without changing how they work. From local files to cloud analytics—without breaking your flow Imagine this scenario: You’re a data...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Announcing Full Collation Support for SQL Databases in Microsoft Fabric (Preview)
item.description: We heard from you and are introducing a major update for SQL database in Microsoft Fabric. Now, you can use all Azure SQL database collations when creating databases. This enhancement gives SQL database in Fabric users greater flexibility and compatibility for global data scenarios, reporting, and...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Windows Insider Program sign-in prompt closing
item.description: Every time I try to sign in to the Windows Insider program, the sign-in prompt opens. It just. Closes. It only shows me the icon of the sign in prompt, and after a few seconds, it closes. And I really want to be in the dev channel of the Windows Insider Program so I can have the best updates. OS...
item.dc:creator: Drakeka

item.title: Does anyone else fondly look back at the Windows Insider Program from 2014-15?
item.description: 2014-15 was when the Windows Insider Program got beta builds of Windows 10. I enrolled on Day 1, I would always download the updates ASAP on the family computer no matter how much it pissed off my sister. I got excited for new builds on Wednesdays and often looked at the Windows blog as well as...
item.dc:creator: Amiasop

item.title: Got my first mac on Windows PC
item.description: Microsoft unveils major Windows 11 preview program overhaul that actually lets you test its new features — Windows Insider Program gains new Experimental and Beta channels with feature flag control
item.dc:creator: Azaellow

item.title: Revo uninstaller not working and system apps can't be deleted
item.description: Hi everyone,I heard Revo Uninstaller is a good app uninstall and but it doesn't seem to work properly for windows system apps. Some apps either fail to uninstall completely or still leave behind files and registry entries. Even worse, there are certain system apps that I can't remove at all, no...
item.dc:creator: CalahanReed

item.title: Migrate Data Ingestion from Data Collector to Log Ingestion
item.description: HTTP Data Collector API in Log Analytics workspaces is being deprecated, and will be totally out of support in September 2026. Data Collector actions in logic app using already created API connections (which uses workspace Id & Key) would still work against old custom log tables, however, newly...
item.dc:creator: mshboul

item.title: Can no longer "log out" (signing out is not logging out)
item.description: Hello, Up until recently, when right clicking the Teams icon on the task bar, there was an option to Log Out of teams, which had the effect of logging out (re-opening the program would instantly lead to LOGGING IN). On the most recently release, this is gone. There is now only an option to SIGN...
item.dc:creator: Justin0880

item.title: Introducing Wildcard Roles in Azure Web PubSub: simpler, smarter permissions for real-time apps
item.description: Real-time interactivity is now a baseline expectation across industries, from collaborative dashboards to trading platforms, IoT monitoring, and live data visualizations. Developers need a way to broadcast data instantly to connected clients without worrying about connection management, scaling, or...
item.dc:creator: kevinguo

item.title: Automating Arc-enabled SQL Server license type configuration with Azure Policy
item.description: Azure Arc enables customers to onboard SQL Server instances - hosted on Linux or Windows - into Azure, regardless of where they are hosted: on‑premises, in multicloud environments, or at the edge. Once onboarded, these resources can be managed through the Azure Portal using services like Azure...
item.dc:creator: TomClaes

item.title: Safe youtube mp3 downloader and converter that still works 2026?
item.description: I have been trying to find a good solution but no luck so far. Is there anything out there in 2026 that is safe and not full of popups? A lot of online converters claim to be free and fast, but most seem unreliable or overloaded with ads, which honestly makes them feel unsafe.A lot of people still...
item.dc:creator: PrestonYork

item.title: Passwordless AKS Secrets: Sync Azure Key Vault with ESO + Workload Identity
item.description: Architecture High-level flow The solution uses a User-Assigned Managed Identity (UAMI) federated to a Kubernetes Service Account via AKS OIDC—then ESO uses that identity to read secrets from Key Vault and write them into Kubernetes as Opaque secrets. Flow:Azure Key Vault → ESO → Kubernetes Secret...
item.dc:creator: fenildoshi2510

item.title: Azure Red Hat OpenShift: Managed Identity and Workload Identity now generally available
item.description: Azure Red Hat OpenShift now supports managed identities and workload identities as a generally available capability, so you can run OpenShift clusters and applications on Azure without long-lived service principal credentials.​ ARO, identity, and Azure governance With GA support for managed...
item.dc:creator: MelanieKraintz007

item.title: Windows 11 D Drive Space Drops Dramatically After Deleting Game
item.description: After emptying the recycle bin to delete a large game folder on Windows 11, my D drive space dropped drastically (from over 100GB to 40GB). Disk check found no errors. What's causing this? Any fixes?
item.dc:creator: Josew

item.title: From Toil to Trust: How Azure SRE Agent Is Redefining Cloud Operations
item.description: As Azure environments scale, infrastructure teams face a familiar challenge: operating reliably at scale.Outages are no longer caused by a single VM or misconfigured service—they emerge from complex dependencies across compute, networking, storage, and platform services. Azure SRE Agent is designed...
item.dc:creator: siddhigupta

item.title: Microsoft 365 error 7q6ch , can't login to my microsoft account
item.description: Microsoft 365 for business account, getting a microsoft popup box everytime I open office to login. I enter my email address and the next screen is always an error "7q6ch" . I can login to office.com no problem. This error will not go away no matter what I do and here's what've done-removed all...
item.dc:creator: henktank

item.title: Enforcing new limits and retiring Opus 4.6 Fast from Copilot Pro+
item.description: As GitHub Copilot continues to rapidly grow, we continue to observe an increase in patterns of high concurrency and intense usage. While we understand this can be driven by legitimate… The post Enforcing new limits and retiring Opus 4.6 Fast from Copilot Pro+ appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Copilot usage metrics now aggregate Copilot cloud agent active user counts
item.description: Note: We’ve recently renamed Copilot coding agent to Copilot cloud agent. We will be updating our data schema for all existing coding agent fields to reflect this change in the… The post Copilot usage metrics now aggregate Copilot cloud agent active user counts appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: An update to the active flow billing model for Azure SRE Agent
item.description: Earlier today, we announced that Azure SRE Agent now supports multiple AI model providers, starting with Anthropic. To support multi-model choice, and make active usage costs easier to understand, we’re updating how active flow usage is measured, effective April 15, 2026. At a glance What’s...
item.dc:creator: Mayunk_Jain

item.title: Pausing new GitHub Copilot Pro trials
item.description: April 13, 2026 update: All GitHub Copilot Pro trials, including existing trials, have been paused while our investigation continues. In the meantime, if you were on a Copilot trial, you… The post Pausing new GitHub Copilot Pro trials appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Actions workflows are limited to 50 reruns
item.description: Actions workflows are now limited to 50 reruns. Going forward, if you attempt to rerun a given workflow more than 50 times, you will get a failed check suite with… The post Actions workflows are limited to 50 reruns appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Copilot CLI activity now included in usage metrics totals and feature breakdowns
item.description: Previous CLI metrics releases added a standalone totals_by_cli section to the Copilot usage metrics API with session counts, request counts, and token usage. That section reported CLI activity separately from… The post Copilot CLI activity now included in usage metrics totals and feature breakdowns...
item.dc:creator: Allison
